calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: James Hannawalt, Esq. appearing for defendant by court call. No appearance by plaintiff. Notice having been given and there being no appearance by plaintiff, or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-21-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Off Calendar

Motion To Compel Verified And Amended Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-01-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS JOSE GUIROLA and LILIANA AZURDIA's Motion To Compel Verified And Amended Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar. Notice of settlement of entire case filed 3/22/22.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOSE GUIROLA, LILIANA AZURDIA MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

Defendants' motion to strike is ordered off calendar to allow a good-faith meet and confer under CCP 435.5 - something that apparently has not occurred. (See Weiss Dec.) The parties are ordered to meet and confer in compliance with the code immediately and defendants' response to the complaint is now due on April 22, 2022. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)

Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Set For Trial On Apr-25-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
